Planning Ceneter API
Table of Contents

Class TestResourceClient

Namespace
Crews.PlanningCenter.Api.Tests.Dummies
Assembly
Crews.PlanningCenter.Api.Tests.dll

Concrete implementation of ResourceClient for testing the abstract base class. Exposes protected methods publicly for test access.

public class TestResourceClient : ResourceClient<TestModel, TestResource, TestResourceResponse>

object
